titleStmt.title: Kuwait 2022 – Speaker 8 – Neighbourhood
WIBARAB Corpus
titleStmt.funder: Funded by the European Research Council under the Grant Agreement 101020127

publicationStmt.distributor: Austrian Center for Digital Humanities and Cultural Heritage

recording.p: Recorded during Kuwait Fieldwork Campaign Gunda Kinzl 2022

prefixDef.p: Private URIs using the teiCorpusHeader prefix are pointers to any element in the WIBARAB teiCorpus document.
Private URIs using the share prefix are pointers to audio file residing on the WIBARAB network share.
Private URIs using the geo prefix are pointers to the xml:id attribute on a place element in VICAV Geodata list.
Private URIs using the dmp prefix are pointers to the xml:id attribute on an element in the WIBARAB DMP document..
Private URIs using the zotid prefix are pointers to the xml:id attribute on a biblStruct element in the TEI export of the VICAV Zotero Group library.
Private URIs using the sources prefix are pointers to the xml:id attribute on an element in the WIBARAB list of sources.

spanGrp.span: God willing, naturally, the Rašāyda tribe is amongst the most noble Arabian tribes
They follow the original historical customs, and thank God, it is found in all, or almost in all the Arabian nations, they are in more than 14 countries.
And there is more than one clan, right?
yes, and clans, there are many clans that extend from it
And tribal subdivisions, what is the difference between the tribal subdivisions and the clans?
This is it, the tribal subdivision is the clan, meaning a clan which comes from another clan, whenever a clan becomes big, another one is derived from it
And every clan has, as you would say, a sheikh, a tribal head, like that
And there are many, thank God
And who do you belong do?
I belong to the Muqwaʕi clan within the Rašāyda tribe
And where are they found? Because I know that that for example the Siyād clan is found only in Kuwait, but the ʕawīmri clan is found in Kuwait and in Saudi Arabia
Look, every clan is found in both Saudi Arabia and Kuwait
Really?
Yes, this a truth that we know. My clan is found in Kuwait and it is also found in Saudi Arabia
Our Arab ancestors have been here in Kuwait for a very long time, from 5 generations ago ##

And they are also found in Saudi Arabia, all of the clans are found there, maybe you can find a clan or two who left and maybe they are not found in Kuwait, or it could be that they are not found in Saudi Arabia
So it's like that
Yes, it's like so
And if you allow me to ask
Yes, go on
When were you born?
I was born in '75
God bless, you are young
Time has taken its toll
And have you been in this area for a very long time or is it quite new?
No, this is new, the Ṣabāḥ al-Aḥmad area is new, its around 10 years old
And have you lived in it for 10 years?
I used to live in Ṣabāḥiyya
In Ṣabāḥiyya
Yes, in Ṣabāḥiyya
It's the one that's not so far from here, right?
No, it's around 30 minutes away, around 30 kms away, something like that
And were did you grow up?
I grew up in Ṣabāḥiyya
In Ṣabāḥiyya throughout your life
Yes
Right, and you were born there
I was born in Saudi Arabia
Yes, I was born in Saudi Arabia
But you didn't live there
I lived there for some time, and then I came here
When you were young
When I was young, yes
Thank God
So from Saudi Arabia you came directly to the Ṣabāḥiyya area
Yes
Was this before or after you got married?
No, this was after I got married
I came to the area, I came to Ṣabāḥiyya, thank God. My husband came full circle to here, he was in Kuwait, from ʕAbbāsiyya, he was born in ʕAbbāsiyya

This is my husband, he was born in ʕAbbāsiyya, and then you know the Aḥmadi area, and then they went to Ṣabāḥiyya, and then you know, it was according to the distribution of the residential places
It depended on the age, the distribution of the housing units, someone gets married and he would get one, maybe his age is 20, 25, like so
And how long did you wait until you got this place?
Was it long? Because they say that sometimes they take a long time to distribute the land
Look the government doesn't take long, it distributes
The government distributes
And it developes areas. But why do the people say that it took long? Because they don't want a place in the particular area offered
They don't want a place in that area
I would want to live in the area that's close to so-and-so place, I swear, the government doesn't break anyone up, it distributes
It distributes, there are people right now of our age, they still haven't gotten any houses
Because they don't want to be in that particular area

Yes they get married and have children and they are in rented places, really, and one would say "I don't have a house", but he didn't take a house (of his own volition), an area after another would be developed and he still would not choose a house
This is the truth, look, my son Fahad is married, he got married 2 years ago, and he will get a house now
He will take a house, God willing
In this same area?
Yes, in the same area, in the south
There are people who wouldn't select a house, they would wait
And then they say "we didn't manage to get this house"
It's nice that you will be close to the family, right?
Yes, everyone loves their own area
Right
